title: PredictionCommitment
description: An immutable record of a candidate's predictive output created before its target is revealed (spec invariant 7.1, record 22.2). The engine is pure and reads no ambient clock, so 'before' is a caller-supplied logical step index from the prequential walk-forward: reveal_not_before_step must be strictly after committed_at_step. commitment_hash seals every committed field so the prediction cannot be edited after the fact.

input_snapshot_hash.description: Hash of the history the prediction was allowed to see.

predictive_output.description: Tagged predictive distribution: point | gaussian | categorical | quantiles | samples.
